  "findings": [
    "Missing explosion-proof seal-off fitting at the classified boundary."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut conduit and install an approved explosion-proof seal-off fitting at the boundary location.",
    "Pour sealing compound after conductors are pulled and verified."
  ],
  "rationale": "The National Electrical Code (NEC) requires a boundary seal where a conduit leaves a classified location to prevent the passage of flammable gases, vapors, or dusts to an unclassified area. The absence of this seal-off fitting is a critical safety violation that can lead to catastrophic explosions.",

    "NEC 501.15",

    "NEC 500-516"
  ]
